violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Sanitizer dispenser was adjusted at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Various equipment was observed stored without properly being air dried. Proper drying procedures reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The 3-bay sink was observed with a leak. System to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application printed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
A dog was observed inside of a grocery cart at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink in the bakery is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
